violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the several sanitation buckets was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (150) ppm. PIC switched out sanitation buckets at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The presence of (drain flies) is not controlled as evidenced by (flies in mop sink area and prep sink area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per PIC maintenance has been made aware and is addressing the issue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
Observed bottom shelve of prep table and can opener blade located in the (prep sink) area not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The following non-food contact surfaces of the: -Slicer -Mixer -Can opener have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The walls in the mop sink room and the ceiling in ware-washing area are constructed of material that is not non-absorbent, smooth, and easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The floors underneath the stove and shelves in the kitchen area and floors in mop sink room have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The ceiling in a food prep area (above slicer and prep tables) is covered with a material that is not smooth, durable, or easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (two ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC had both ice machines taken out of service and ice was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Milk and creamer were observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

A refrigeration unit located in a kitchenette was observed in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

The left bay of a two bay food prep sink is lacking an adequate air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The ceiling in a food prep area (above slicer and prep table) is covered with a material that is not smooth, durable, or easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
